goal_text:
You got injured and are looking for a 'hospital' nearby. The hospital should have the 'cambridge eye unit' department.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You got injured and are looking for a hospital nearby. The hospital should have the cambridge eye unit department
Make sure you get address and phone number
